insight.headline: Market-driven shipping
insight.what_changed: The GraphQL Admin API now supports market-driven shipping configuration, allowing apps to configure shipping directly on a market. This change helps apps support different shipping settings for various markets. The market-driven shipping configuration is available in API version 2026-07.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their apps to use the new market-driven shipping configuration. They can use the GraphQL Admin API to configure shipping directly on a market, which helps support different shipping settings for various markets. Developers should also be aware of the deprecation of merchant-owned delivery profile APIs for market-driven shipping. To migrate, developers can use the new market-driven shipping APIs, such as the Market object, to configure shipping settings. They should also remove any references to the deprecated delivery profile APIs.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will be able to configure shipping settings for each market, allowing for more flexibility and control over their shipping options. This change will also help merchants to better manage their shipping settings and reduce errors.
insight.why_it_matters: This change matters because it allows developers to build more flexible and scalable shipping solutions for merchants. It also helps merchants to better manage their shipping settings and reduce errors, which can lead to improved customer satisfaction and increased sales.

also_worth_knowing.text: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill

updates.title: [DRAFT] Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing sub-region markets to be configured with country-subdivision regions. This feature is available in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07 release candidate.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting from API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The React SDK for Shop Minis has added typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants, adding variants to cart, and sending buyers to express checkout.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by profile.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to make the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient by inferring a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to add deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API, allowing apps to set a deposit when creating or updating a draft order.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false, and integrations should be updated to send non-cumulative engagements.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: The GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a lineItem field, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

updates.title: Discount application information now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API
updates.summary: Discount application information is now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API, allowing apps to query discounts applied to a draft order.

updates.title: `discountedUnitPrice` on `DraftOrderLineItem` Customer Account API deprecation
updates.summary: The discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object in the Customer Account API is now deprecated, and apps should use approximateDiscountedUnitPrice instead.

updates.title: `BusinessEntity` now exposes `legalEntityId` in the GraphQL Admin API
updates.summary: The BusinessEntity type in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a new legalEntityId field, which returns the stable Central Legal Entity ID from Shopify's Organizations Platform.

recap.headline: Shopify updates: Market-driven shipping, new GraphQL fields, and Hydrogen deployments

themes.title: Market-driven shipping
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration as of API version 2026-07. Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping.

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: New fields are available in the GraphQL Admin API, including MarketRegionSubdivision, OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus, draft order deposit fields, and lineItem field on the GiftCard object. The BusinessEntity type now exposes a legalEntityId field. The discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object is deprecated in favor of approximateDiscountedUnitPrice.

themes.title: Hydrogen and deployment updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen now deploys to Vercel, and the @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0. The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

actions.text: Update integrations to use non-cumulative marketing engagements
Update code to use new GraphQL fields and types
